description: FAQ chip queries for Askfer portfolio chat. Plain query strings only — pass to POST /api/v1/askfer/stream as the `query` field. All queries verified grounded against the Personal_Portfolio knowledge base.

default: What makes you different from other learning designers?
Which project had the biggest impact?
How do you measure training success?

methodology: How do you use Bloom's Taxonomy?

How do you design for adult learners?
metrics: How many users have you reached?

more: Which project are you most proud of?
